query:
SELECT 
  priority,
  COUNT(*) AS total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pending,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'withdrawn' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS withdrawn
FROM requests
WHERE request_type = 'vacation'
GROUP BY priority
ORDER BY priority;

SELECT 
  priority,
  COUNT(*) AS total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pending,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'withdrawn' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS withdrawn
FROM requests
WHERE request_type = 'vacation'
GROUP BY priority
ORDER BY priority;
